title: Overview
purpose: Introduce wizard-ai as a loop-engineering CLI for Claude Code and summarize the problem it solves, its architecture, and its major subsystems.

title: Installation
purpose: Document the npm, manual, and Docker installation paths and what the installer places on disk.

title: Architecture
purpose: Describe the CLI dispatcher, entry points, and how bin/ commands route into scripts/ and skills/.

title: 5 Sequenced Loop-Engineering Workflows (01â†’05)
purpose: Explain the 01-05 compress/dedupe/memory/design-QA/spec-validate workflow sequence and its command mapping.

title: Caveman-Compress Engine
purpose: Document the token-compression detect/compress/validate/benchmark pipeline and its CLI entry points.

title: Memory & Context System
purpose: Cover session memory persistence, the Windows fallback path, and the context-format layer used across the CLI.

title: AI Proxy & Cockpit Tools
purpose: Explain the wz-ai-proxy request router and its cockpit-bridge integration for tool calls.

title: Pi Dynamic Configurator
purpose: Document how wz-ai-pi-configurator auto-detects and configures AI provider endpoints.

title: RepoDocs Wiki Generator
purpose: Describe the wiki-planner/wiki-writer fan-out pipeline that generates DeepWiki-style docs for a target repo.

title: Skills Marketplace & 2-Way Sync
purpose: Explain how skills are kept synchronized between agent/skills, .claude/skills, and skills/, and how they are validated.

title: Local Hub Dashboard
purpose: Document the local web GUI (server, database, and JS modules) launched by wz-ai-hub.

title: Master Project Bootstrap
purpose: Document how wz-ai-init scans a brownfield project and scaffolds the .wz-ai/ context directory.

title: Security: Audit Tooling & Trust Boundaries
purpose: Cover the Strix security-audit CLI, the git-guardrails pre-commit hook, and CodeQL CI scanning as the repo's threat-model surface.

title: Brainstorming / Design-Review Skill
purpose: Document the local server.cjs design-review tool and its start/stop scripts, the most-connected module in the codebase.

title: Office Document Authoring (docx/pptx/xlsx)
purpose: Explain the shared BaseSchemaValidator architecture and pack/unpack/validate pipeline used by the docx, pptx, and xlsx skills.

title: PDF Forms Skill
purpose: Document the PDF form field extraction, filling, and bounding-box validation scripts.

title: Slack GIF Creator Skill
purpose: Document the frame composition, easing, and GIF-building pipeline used to generate Slack-compatible GIFs.

title: Stitch Design Toolkit
purpose: Cover the static-HTML extraction, React component/native, and Remotion scaffolding scripts under stitch-design.

title: Algorithmic Art Skill
purpose: Document the generator template used to scaffold algorithmic-art scripts.

title: Hallmark Skill
purpose: Document the genre-reference and component-cookbook knowledge base used by the hallmark skill.

title: Webapp Testing Skill
purpose: Document the browser console logging, element discovery, and local-server test harness examples.

title: Writing Skills
purpose: Document the writing-skills package and its graph-rendering helper.

title: MCP Builder Skill
purpose: Document the connection and evaluation scripts used to scaffold Model Context Protocol servers.

title: Skill-Creator Meta-Skill
purpose: Document the skill-packaging, validation, and eval-loop tooling used to author new skills.

title: Awesome Agent Skills Integration
purpose: Document the vendored Awesome Agent Skills knowledge base and its role as a skill-discovery source.

title: Spec-Kit Integration
purpose: Document the vendored spec-kit reference repo and how it feeds the spec-validation workflow.

title: Development
purpose: Describe the CI workflows (CodeQL and dev-mode image builds) and local dev setup.

title: Contributing
purpose: Summarize the contribution guidelines from CONTRIBUTING.md.

title: Changelog
purpose: Summarize the release history recorded in CHANGELOG.md.
